title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #13, Robin, Scopper Gaban as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
